summary: Aura forces adjacent enemies to target provoker
trigger_or_condition: Enemies within 1 tile enter Provoked status
core_effect: Stops moves and enforces attacks on provoker

trigger_or_condition: Unit attempts explicit move or attack

core_effect: Queues extra attacks against other adjacent enemies

trigger_or_condition: When attacker is behind target or victim always-backstabbed
core_effect: Adds damage bonus and disables counter

trigger_or_condition: When enemy attack action targets unit
core_effect: Creates retaliatory attack if in reach

trigger_or_condition: At battle pet controller update window
core_effect: Chooses move/attack automatically and blocks manual orders

trigger_or_condition: When card is played onto board
core_effect: Buffers events then runs custom onOpeningGambit logic

trigger_or_condition: When die action resolves on owning unit

core_effect: Applies sub-modifiers to entities matching radius/filters
Iterates modifiers and removes those with isRemovable flag

trigger_or_condition: At end-turn queue empty draw window
core_effect: Deck generates actionsDrawNewCards respecting hand size
